overview.description: The FlexShares Ultra-Short Income Fund (RAVI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in a short-term portfolio of investment grade public and private debt issued domestically and abroad. RAVI was launched on Oct 9, 2012 and is issued by FlexShares.
